title: Perfect World [Wanmei Shijie] Episode 50 Subtitle
description: "Perfect World" was adapted from the novel of the same name. He was born to cultivate Tao, and for havoc, he turned to rain thousands of blood, fell over the centuries, and experienced countless times and spaces, purification many years, he turned forever. See how the brilliant hero Shi Hao throughout his life created an endless legend..
